    RateLimitFilter
    RateLimitConfig.rateLimitFilter(io.github.bucket4j.distributed.proxy.ProxyManager<String> proxyManager, OrasakaRateLimitTierRepository tierRepository)

    org.springframework.boot.web.servlet.FilterRegistrationBean<RateLimitFilter>

    Configures a FilterRegistrationBean to disable automatic container registration of the filter.
